pi_items.source: Wikipedia and OpenStreetMap real-world coordinates for Museum of Science and Industry
Wikipedia and OpenStreetMap real-world coordinates for Museum of Science and Industry
Approximates real-world altitude (~182m) for Museum of Science and Industry
Task description instructions and NORAD catalog (ISS Zarya and CSS Tianhe)
Task description instructions and verifier logic
verifier.py scoring logic allocates 10 points to map-only layout and 15 points to preferences updated

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world NORAD satellite catalog data (TLE datasets) for the International Space Station (25544) and the Chinese Space Station (48274). The geographic coordinates provided in the metadata correctly match the real-world location of the Museum of Science and Industry (MSI) in Chicago (41.7906, -87.5830) along with its approximate altitude. There is a contradiction in the scoring weights: the metadata claims 15 points for map_only_layout and 10 points for preferences_updated, whereas verifier.py allocates exactly 10 points for the map-only layout and 15 points for visual preferences updates.
